baselines: small GRU/LSTM if dependency/runtime budget is practical
tree/boosting window baseline if scikit-learn is available
CRA v2.3 generic bounded recurrent-state baseline
leakage_controls: no test-unit future RUL labels during online prediction
chronological prediction within each engine unit
all task transforms logged to JSON before model scoring
metrics: NASA asymmetric prognostics score if implemented cleanly
next_step: Tier 7.1b should implement a source/data preflight for NASA C-MAPSS, download or locate the data reproducibly, write checksums and license notes, then emit a tiny adapter smoke before full scoring.
nonclaims: not evidence that variable-delay private diagnostics generalize
not language, planning, AGI, or ASI evidence

pass_fail.contract_pass_means: the adapter is fully predeclared and safe to implement; it does not mean CRA is useful on C-MAPSS
fail_or_narrow_if: simple age/lag/ESN/GRU baselines dominate all metrics
CRA wins only through private preprocessing choices
wins vanish on held-out units or tail-window scoring
mechanism shams match the claimed mechanism
dataset licensing/download cannot be made reproducible
tier7_1b_pass_would_require: at least v2.2, v2.3, lag, reservoir, and ESN baselines run on the same rows
no baseline freeze or hardware transfer from smoke evidence alone
tier7_1c_or_later_usefulness_gate_would_: v2.3 or a later promoted mechanism beats or complements strongest fair baselines
seed/unit-level stability and worst-unit behavior are reported
v2.3 shams/ablations separate if v2.3 is part of the claim
metrics include effect size or confidence intervals where practical
same public adapter can be reproduced from a fresh checkout

selected_adapter.first_executable_scope: local source/data preflight plus one compact FD001-style smoke if the data license/download path is clean
selected_adapter.reason: Tier 6.2a found a narrow variable-delay signal. C-MAPSS is the first real-ish public stream family to test delayed sensor history -> future degradation/RUL structure without relying on private task generators.

source_audit.name: NASA Prognostics Center of Excellence Data Set Repository
source_audit.role: primary official source for C-MAPSS / turbofan degradation data access

source_audit.name: DASHlink Turbofan Engine Degradation Simulation Data Set
source_audit.role: official NASA DASHlink landing page for the classic C-MAPSS turbofan data resource

source_audit.name: Numenta Anomaly Benchmark
source_audit.role: secondary candidate for streaming anomaly adapter after C-MAPSS contract execution

source_audit.name: UCR/UEA Time Series Classification Archive
source_audit.role: future held-out time-series classification adapter source

source_audit.name: PhysioNet databases
source_audit.role: future biosignal/event-stream adapter source after license/split audit
